title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Cleartrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip family as a Marketplace Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!
